comment.body: A lot of industry guys and Alma herself, say it's the only accurate platform for monitoring MM positioning, 'cause they buy the data straight from the CBOE. Alma even shared a link and a code for a 10% discount. I worked with Citadel, and it's similar. The Depthview is fucking valuable. I'd recommend going with the Pro version. At most, you'll switch next month.  But for intraday, it's unbeatable

comment.body: I use 10min, 7MA, 1.5 SD. i've found it is more accurate for entries/exits with a secondary signal such as Alma's lines (or my own), or voodoo lines...whatever works best for you. i've found if i 100% rely on the signal alone it's a lot of stops and the bigger moves i want come with more support.

comment.body: i also l ike looking at 1 day TF, 20 MA as a longer view. it helps me *lean* bullish or bearish. i'm not suggesting this is the best look but looking historically it does show times i would want to be in either state for a bit. a lot of stuff is triggering long in recent days.
